_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
MONITORING

| Event | Issuing Body | Expected Timing | What to Watch For |
|---|---|---|---|
| Close of RFI comment period | U.S. DOT | Stated in 2025-13219; deadline not confirmed from source text (see Research Gap above) | Calendar the deadline; submit comments if warranted |
| Draft NFSP 2025 publication | U.S. DOT | Post-RFI; no published date confirmed from available sources | Draft will incorporate public input and signal federal infrastructure and sustainability priorities for the 5-year planning horizon |
| Final NFSP 2025 adoption | U.S. DOT | No confirmed date available from sources in this pool | Final plan will govern DOT grant prioritization and state freight plan alignment |
| ZEF Corridor Strategy implementation milestones | Joint Office of Energy and Transportation (DOE/DOT) | Rolling; 2024 strategy already published | ZEF corridor buildout will determine where zero-emission drayage is operationally available on the workspace's US road corridors | 

*Source for ZEF corridor: Joint Office of Energy and Transportation, "2024 National Zero-Emission Freight Corridor Strategy," DOE/EE-2816. https://driveelectric.gov/files/zef-corridor-strategy.pdf*

*Source for NFSP 2025 RFI: Federal Register / U.S. Department of Transportation, 2025-13219, July 15, 2025.*

**Research Gap:** No confirmed publication timeline for the draft or final 2025 NFSP was available from the sources in this pool. The USDOT NFSP landing page (https://www.transportation.gov/freight/NFSP) should be monitored for schedule announcements.

---
